description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden filing cabinet with a dark brown finish, featuring six drawers—three on each side—with metallic bar handles. The top surface is adorned with a globe, a large parchment-like map, and a yellow folder, suggesting an office or study environment. Several drawers are partially open, revealing manila folders and interior compartments. The cabinet sits on small caster wheels, making it mobile and easy to reposition. The wood grain is visible, giving the cabinet a classic, sturdy appearance. The overall design is functional and professional, suitable for organizing documents and office supplies.
description: A dark brown wooden filing cabinet with six drawers, metallic handles, caster wheels, and office items on top. It has a classic, professional look and is designed for document storage.
description_view_0: The cabinet is viewed from the side, showing the top with a globe, map, and folder, and the right-side drawers partially open.
description_view_1: The front view displays all six drawers, with three on each side, and the central open space beneath the top surface.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the globe and map on top, with the left-side drawers open and visible.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the plain back panel of the cabinet, with the globe and folder visible on the top surface.
